falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match, as that pattern resolved with lower lows and consolidation; breaking to new highs indicates the macro engine misidentified the structure and the bottoming process failed

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.00 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained sub-12 VIX contradicts the elevated volatility regime typical of bottoming patterns; it would signal complacency and risk-on extension rather than the uncertainty and capitulation implied by the 78% bottom pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained flight-to-quality bid in bonds with yields breaking to new cycle lows would invalidate the bottom call, as the bottom_2024_aug pattern featured yields stabilizing/rising alongside equity recovery; this would indicate recession panic rather than soft-landing bottoming

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
